tool_args.label: Third Track Model Project completed on time and under budget
tool_args.raw_text: Third Track has been, from start to finish, the MTA's model megaproject, completed on time and $100 million under budget.

payload.claim_text: Third Track has been, from start to finish, the MTA's model megaproject, completed on time and $100 million under budget.
payload.subject: Third Track Model Project

tool_args.label: Elmont UBS Arena Station bidirectional service
tool_args.raw_text: The MTA also celebrated this month the bidirectional service at Elmont UBS-Arena, which is the LIRR's first new station in almost half a century.

payload.claim_text: The MTA also celebrated this month the bidirectional service at Elmont UBS-Arena, which is the LIRR's first new station in almost half a century.
payload.subject: Elmont UBS-Arena Station

tool_args.label: Subway service delivery September 2022
tool_args.raw_text: Subway service delivery increased again in September to almost 94%

tool_args.label: Customer journey time performance September 2022
tool_args.raw_text: 84% of customers getting to their destination, including wait time and time on board, within a couple minutes of schedule

payload.raw_value_text: 84% of customers getting to their destination, including wait time and time on board, within a couple minutes of schedule

tool_args.label: OMNY market share currently 35%
tool_args.raw_text: OMNY market share, which currently stands at 35% across the system

tool_args.label: Cameras in subway stations coverage
tool_args.raw_text: extending coverage at 200+ stations in just 12 months, resulting in 472 stations having coverage since last year

payload.raw_value_text: 472 stations having coverage since last year

tool_args.label: Cameras on train cars planned procurement
tool_args.raw_text: buying another 5,400 cameras so the entire fleet can be covered

payload.raw_value_text: another 5,400 cameras so the entire fleet can be covered

tool_args.label: ADA accessible stations upgrades record
tool_args.raw_text: during the pandemic the agency completed upgrades at a record 15 subway stations—more than the entire seven-year period between 2012 and 2018

payload.raw_value_text: record 15 subway stations—more than the entire seven-year period between 2012 and 2018

tool_args.label: ZFA accessibility upgrades at no cost to MTA
tool_args.raw_text: the MTA has used ZFA to get upgrades at no cost to the MTA at four stations in three boroughs: 53rd St in Manhattan, 57th St and Fifth Avenue in Manhattan, Queensboro Plaza in Queens and Union Street in Brooklyn

payload.raw_value_text: the MTA has used ZFA to get upgrades at no cost to the MTA at four stations in three boroughs: 53rd St in Manhattan, 57th St and Fifth Avenue in Manhattan, Queensboro Plaza in Queens and Union Street in Brooklyn

tool_args.label: MTA Capital Program budget
tool_args.raw_text: historic $55 billion capital program

tool_args.label: C&D Procurement Agenda total
tool_args.raw_text: The Procurement Agenda this month includes twelve actions for a proposed expenditure of $1.6B.

payload.raw_value_text: twelve actions for a proposed expenditure of $1.6B

tool_args.label: ADA Accessibility Upgrades Package 3 (P3)
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Construction & Development requests Board approval to award a publicly advertised and competitively solicited contract for the design, construction, financing and maintenance of American with Disabilities Act (ADA) accessibility upgrades at thirteen stations throughout New York City to Elevated Accessibility Enhancements in the amount of $965,257,102.

payload.project_name: Elevated Accessibility Enhancements - ADA Accessibility Upgrades at Thirteen Stations - Package 3
payload.description: Design, construction, financing and maintenance of elevators and other ADA improvements at 13 NYCT subway stations including 21 new elevators and 14 elevator replacements

tool_args.label: LIRR ADA Station Improvements Package #1
tool_args.raw_text: Design-Build Services for the Long Island Rail Road ADA Station Improvements Package #1

payload.project_name: Long Island Rail Road ADA Station Improvements Package #1
payload.description: ADA improvements to nine LIRR stations in Nassau, Suffolk, and Queens counties

tool_args.label: Jamaica Capacity Improvement Phase II
tool_args.raw_text: The LIRR is advancing the Jamaica Capacity Improvement (JCI) Phase II project. JCI is a transformative project that will increase train throughput and decrease travel times for LIRR passengers traveling through Jamaica, lengthen all existing Jamaica Station platforms, upgrade Jamaica's rail systems

payload.project_name: Jamaica Capacity Improvement Project Phase II
payload.description: Increase train throughput and decrease travel times for LIRR passengers through Jamaica, lengthen all existing Jamaica Station platforms, upgrade rail systems

tool_args.label: Jamaica Bus Depot Reconstruction Project
tool_args.raw_text: The Project will both reconstruct and expand JBD to manage the operation, maintenance, and on-site storage for up to 272 Standard Bus Equivalents ("SBE")

payload.status: Determination of Findings approval for eminent domain
payload.description: Reconstruct and expand Jamaica Bus Depot to manage up to 272 Standard Bus Equivalents (SBE), includes 15 maintenance bays, zero-emissions bus fleet support with minimum of 60 electric buses

tool_args.label: Third Track - 10 miles operational
tool_args.raw_text: the entire 10-mile Third Track is fully operational

payload.raw_value_text: entire 10-mile Third Track is fully operational

tool_args.raw_text: Third Track has been, from start to finish, the MTA's model megaproject, completed on time and $100 million under budget.

payload.raw_value_text: completed on time and $100 million under budget

tool_args.label: Fare evasion enforcement - 60% more summonses
tool_args.raw_text: The NYPD is issuing more summonses—60% more in fact

payload.claim_text: The NYPD is issuing more summonses—60% more in fact
payload.subject: NYPD fare enforcement

tool_args.label: Unarmed guards at emergency gates pilot
tool_args.raw_text: the agency has launched a pilot deploying uniformed but unarmed guards next to emergency gates, which is already showing impact on the frequency of fare evasion in those stations

payload.claim_text: the agency has launched a pilot deploying uniformed but unarmed guards next to emergency gates, which is already showing impact on the frequency of fare evasion in those stations
payload.subject: MTA fare evasion pilot

tool_args.label: Borough Hall Station ADA Accessibility Upgrades
tool_args.raw_text: Contract A37145 is for Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) improvements at the Borough Hall Station to bring this station into ADA compliance.

payload.description: ADA improvements at Borough Hall Station including three new elevators and platform edge reconstruction for 4 and 5 trains
Station maintenance billings for the period 04/01/21-03/31/22

tool_args.label: 95% accessibility goal for entire subway system
tool_args.raw_text: The MTA has settled the litigation with the disability advocates, which had been lingering for many years, and has devised a joint plan on how to achieve 95% accessibility in the entire subway system.

payload.claim_text: The MTA has settled the litigation with the disability advocates, which had been lingering for many years, and has devised a joint plan on how to achieve 95% accessibility in the entire subway system.
payload.subject: MTA subway system accessibility

tool_args.label: Fiscal cliff - need for new funding system
tool_args.raw_text: the MTA needs a new system of funding mass transit, one that reflects its vital importance to New York, whether it includes new federal funding or funding from Albany

payload.gap_text: The MTA needs a new system of funding mass transit, one that reflects its vital importance to New York
payload.description: The MTA faces a fiscal cliff and needs new federal or state funding to stabilize finances
payload.missing_information: New funding system not yet secured

tool_args.raw_text: MTA Construction & Development ("C&D") requests Board approval to award a publicly advertised and competitively solicited contract for the design, construction, financing and maintenance of American with Disabilities Act ("ADA") accessibility upgrades at thirteen stations throughout New York City

tool_args.raw_text: MTA Construction and Development ("C&D") requests Board approval to award a publicly advertised and competitively solicited contract to Citnalta/Scalamandre Joint Venture ... for design-build services for Long Island Rail Road ("LIRR") ADA Station Improvements Package #1

tool_args.label: LIRR advancing JCI Phase II
tool_args.raw_text: AGENCY: Metropolitan Transportation Authority ("MTA") and MTA Long Island Rail Road ("LIRR") ... The LIRR is advancing the Jamaica Capacity Improvement (JCI) Phase II project.

tool_args.label: MTA NYCT operates Jamaica Bus Depot
tool_args.raw_text: The existing Jamaica Bus Depot ("JBD") is located a 165-18 Tuskegee Airmen Way in Jamaica Queens.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison Terminal - East Side Access
tool_args.raw_text: Contract VM014 (the "Contract") provides engineering and fabrication for all of the elevators and escalators (also referred to as vertical circulation elements) for the East Side Access project.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison (East Side Access)
tool_args.raw_text: Contract VM014 (the "Contract") provides engineering and fabrication for all of the elevators and escalators (also referred to as vertical circulation elements) for the East Side Access project. MTA Construction and Development requests Board approval to award a modification to the Contract for the maintenance of all of the elevators and escalators at the new Grand Central Madison Terminal

payload.project_name: Grand Central Madison Terminal (East Side Access)
payload.description: New terminal includes twenty elevators and thirty-eight escalators. Maintenance contract modification approved for vertical circulation elements
